title: Camrips Discussion Thread
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Camrips Discussion Thread             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 22, 2012 5:36 pm I dont know if im alowed to post them here, but on 4chan you can find em pretty fast i think. 3 parts. 1. Is about Shinji meeting gendo, Rei (shiranai, naked etc..) Piano scene ~8min 2. Kaworu+Shinji stargazing ~40 secs 3. Wille/Wunder vs the Angel, ascension of wunder, AT FIELD MAGIC. ~4min EDIT: Camrip for most of finale leaked; discussion starts here.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 22, 2012 5:38 pm That post is just fine as it is. Just the facts (not the links).

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 22, 2012 5:41 pm Thanks Tines. My first 2 cents after whatching: That WUNDER ship looks ridiculous even for Evangelion standards.. I mean i saw the scans of the booklet but still..

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:04 pm This film is ridiculously gorgeous, I can tell that from the shitty camrip already. Hands down the best looking NME. The art direction and designs are wonderful, colours and lightning rock. Shinji is intuitive guy but still, that piano scene was over the t-OH WHO CARES IT LOOKS SO SWEET KAWORUUUU I love this footage. 3.0 confirmed for best Webuild, Rebuild Kaworu x Shinji confirmed for best Kaworu x Shinji dat nadia music OMG IT'S PINKIE-CHAN MIDORIIIIIII 10/10 would get eye cancer again

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:05 pm These graffix.... My body can't take it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:09 pm Clover wrote: These graffix.... My body can't take it.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:13 pm Aint working for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:14 pm Yes the Animation looks REALLY good, its just the whole Wunder - scene leaving a bit of a 'really..?' taste..

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:14 pm Xard wrote: Every fucking time I see someone talk about "graffix" when it comes to film visuals I want to punch folks.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:15 pm Ramiel² wrote: Yes the Animation looks REALLY good, its just the whole Wunder - scene leaving a bit of a 'really..?' taste..

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:16 pm Xard wrote: Sorry, I'm too busy getting my ears filled by Captain Nemo's semen to notice anything weird.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:22 pm Clover wrote: Stick/ass etc. Wonder if the piano scene was hand drawn.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:24 pm Xard wrote: I don't really mind having a stick in the ass about this at all because less retarded gamerisms influence film discussion the better (it's bad enough to lump anything visual under "graff1x3s" like is way too usual with game discussion, for heaven's sake don't spread the cancer outside the zone beyond hope). Plust it always reminds me of TDSA's retarded reviews

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:29 pm I see the future. It involves red text. Camrips have been removed. Crap.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:31 pm Space Jesus plays they piano! I can't wait if/when we get more.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:32 pm watched about 10 secs(will wait for whole thing), and real talk, probably going to be my fav EVA movie ever! PS Probably the most shallow nerdy post Ive ever done on the internet but............ Sakura(Tojis sis) is the hottest Anime character ever. (my opinion obviously).

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:34 pm Now I'm imagining Rider from Fate Zero as one of the tech's. >< Damn you Ohtsuka Akio and you're epic voice.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:34 pm Clover wrote: Your Japanese cartoon site will survive. AAAAAAND now it's gone. AAAAAAND now it's on youtube

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:39 pm He films the star scene out of everything else insanely cool in this movie. You know what? Aint even mad. Just. FUCK

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 22, 2012 6:41 pm Clover wrote: He films the star scene out of everything else insanely cool in this movie. You know what? Aint even mad. Just. FUCK
